title: Ultra-Orthodox Riot Shocks Israelis In Latest Protest At Military Draft
summary_full: Israel’s Haredim have escalated their protests against military service in recent weeks, underscoring growing divisions ahead of national elections.
summary_public: Israel’s Haredim have escalated their protests against military service in recent weeks, underscoring growing divisions ahead of national elections.

IL.label: neutral
